texto: When standing in the middle of the marvelous mountains and deep forests, in the earthy smell of all beginnings and endings, I often find myself asking what I have if all my possessions were taken away. Without money, car, house; or power and fame, if there are any, who am I? In that very moment, being away from the external voices and left alone in nature, I find my answer.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Zi Nguyen que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “When standing in the middle of the marvelous mountains and deep forests, in the earthy smell of a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, forest, get-lost-be-found, com foco em viagem e inspiracao.
